content.en:
Understanding his own problems, Ye Tian found the direction, and no longer deliberately used the combination of ten secret techniques to create a more powerful secret technique, but used one secret technique to exert his own advantages to improve other aspects.

Moreover, Ye Tian still has less Dao under control, although it has broken a thousand, but the foundation is still not enough.

Therefore, Ye Tian continued to use the ten secret techniques to improve himself, and used the ten secret techniques to improve other aspects as much as possible, striving to completely tap the potential of the ten secret techniques, without the need to rush to create more powerful secret techniques.

And just like that, the years passed, and a long time passed.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian once again practiced penance and retreated for 150,000 realms.

This retreat was long, but the rewards were great.

Under his close to full ascension, he had already controlled 3,000 Daos, and his own will had improved a lot, although he had not reached the peak realm of the eighth order, but there was no gap.

Moreover, under the increase of the secret of care, he could even exert a will that almost surpassed the peak realm of the eighth order.

And the physical aspect has also been raised to the current extreme, and using the secret of the body, the physical body is completely controlled, and the power can be exerted to the limit.

Moreover, his use of power, time, space, and so on has reached an unimaginable level, and he has even created a large number of top-notch space-time control techniques, and the strength of the 1930 body is much stronger than in the past.

It can be said that Ye Tian has brought the role of the ten secret techniques to the extreme, and he has a new understanding and mastery of the ten secret techniques.

It can even be said that he has developed a new understanding through the ten secret arts, and the secret art and the secret art are connected, and the same is true of these ten secret arts.

this day.

Ye Tian once again tried to create a secret technique that surpassed the ten secret techniques, and through the connection with the ten secret techniques and his understanding and perception of them, he absorbed their essence to create, rather than forcibly fusing the ten secret techniques.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian gradually had some insights and gains, and even saw the dawn.

Of course, even if this is the case, it will take a long time for Ye Tian to create such a secret technique, but at least there is hope to create it.

......

Three hundred and thirty thousand rivers later.

Ye Tian initially created a secret technique, but there were still big flaws, it was not a complete secret technique, so it still needed to be perfected.

However, Ye Tian was very excited, because he was finally going to create it, and then he only needed to improve it step by step.

In order to perfect this secret technique, Ye Tian asked the copy body to experiment personally, looking for loopholes and defects through experiments again and again.

As a result, Ye Tian's copy body collapsed and fell again and again.

In other words, other half-step Eternal Masters would not dare to experiment so wildly, and Eternal Masters would not dare to experiment once at all, because the Eternal Masters are just an ontology and have no clones.

Of course, the eternal master incarnates billions, and this @ is an advantage.

It's been a long time again, I don't know how many times I have broken my copy body, and finally in this place, Ye Tiancai can be regarded as truly perfecting this secret technique.

Ye Tian named this secret technique the Soul Swallowing Technique, and the Soul Swallowing Technique definitely surpassed the ten secret techniques.

The Life Devouring Technique was successfully created, and Ye Tian had perfected it many times to confirm that it had no defects, so he contacted the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Airplanes!!!

The will of the Ten Elements Ancestor descended and directly took Ye Tian away.

Seeing the Ten Elements Ancestor again, Ye Tian said respectfully: "After seeing the Ten Elements Ancestor, I have created a secret technique that surpasses the Ten Secret Techniques. "

The Ten Elements Ancestor deduced for a moment, and then smiled and said, "Very good, the secret technique you created is indeed beyond the ten secret techniques, and only one person is allowed to practice." If you have completed the third assessment, you can become my fifth personal disciple. "

"Let's go, I'll take you to Wanyuan Mountain!"

I saw that as soon as the Ten Elements Ancestor waved his hand, Ye Tian was taken to Wanyuan Mountain by the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Wanyuan Mountain is located in the Origin Boundary Sea and is the dojo of the Ten Elements Ancestors.

Here, except for the personal disciples and official disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor, others are not allowed to enter, nor can they enter.

At this time, there were not many people on Wanyuan Mountain, and when Ye Tian came here, more than a dozen people came here.

"Master, is this a new junior brother?"

A young man asked.

"You should call him Senior Brother!" said the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"What, Senior Brother, he is the fifth personal disciple of Shizun?"

The crowd was shocked.

You must know that the Ten Elements Ancestor has not accepted his own disciples for many years, and when the first few disciples were first accepted, the conditions for accepting apprentices were lower, especially for the first disciple, the conditions for accepting disciples were very low, and they were not necessarily higher than their talents.

But now, if you want to become a disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, you must complete three tests that are almost impossible to complete.

But someone still did it!

Demons!

It's so wicked!

These people respectfully called Ye Tian one after another: "Senior brother!"

Ye Tian had a strange look on his face, he could see that all of these people were Eternal Controllers, and their strength was much stronger than that of the Half-Tooth Controllers, and his aura made him feel suffocated.

Such an existence even called him a senior brother, he was simply flattered!

However, as a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, he also has to have his own majesty and cannot be cowardly.

"Hello juniors!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Disperse first!" commanded the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"Yes!"

One by one, the disciples left.

On Wanyuan Mountain, in a pavilion.

Ye Tian and the Ten Elements Ancestor sat here.

The Ten Elements Ancestor spoke: "In a few days, I will hold an apprenticeship ceremony for you, and then introduce all the senior brothers and disciples to you." Wanyuan Mountain has a total of five personal disciples, thirty-three official disciples, and more than three hundred registered disciples, such as the half-tooth master you know, who is one of my registered disciples. "

"That's a lot!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

There are quite a few disciples here, and each of them is incomparably stronger, no weaker than the half-tooth master.

The Ten Elements Ancestor continued, "What is the name of the secret technique you cultivate?"

"Life-Swallowing!"

Ye Tian said.

"Life Devouring Technique!" Ten Elements Ancestor muttered a few words, and then proposed: "Your secret technique should be able to turn his life into his own life, if it devours a very rebellious life, it will help you a lot, what kind of life do you want to devour?"

"Haven't figured it out yet!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

The Ten Elements Ancestor proposed, "Black Silent Sea, you can think about this kind of life. "

"Black Silent Sea!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

The Black Sea is also a special kind of life, and even the Eternal Masters cannot destroy it.

But can he devour it?

"Master, I'll give it a try. Ye Tian said.

"Next, you will stay in Wanyuan Mountain, I have already informed your senior brothers and disciples, and when they arrive, I will hold a ceremony for you to accept apprentices. Ten Xingzu said.

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tianying said. _
